# ChalkPicks Pro

> AI-powered sports betting analytics platform providing daily picks, +EV finder, arbitrage detection, CLV tracking, and advanced tools for NFL, NBA, MLB, NHL, NCAAF, NCAAB, MMA, Soccer, and Tennis.

## About

ChalkPicks Pro uses machine learning and statistical modeling to identify positive expected value (+EV) betting opportunities across major US sportsbooks. The platform serves recreational and professional sports bettors with data-driven tools.

## Core Features

- **AI Daily Picks**: Algorithmically generated picks with confidence scores (70-95%) and edge analysis
- **+EV Finder**: Real-time positive expected value scanner using proportional devig across 15+ sportsbooks
- **CLV Tracker**: Closing Line Value tracking to measure betting sharpness over time
- **Arbitrage Finder**: Cross-book arbitrage detection with optimal stake allocation
- **Steam Moves Alerts**: Sharp money detection and reverse line movement (RLM) identification
- **Prop Optimizer**: AI-powered player prop recommendations with correlation analysis
- **Line Movement Tracker**: Real-time spread, moneyline, and total line movement across books
- **Parlay Builder**: Correlation-aware parlay construction with true probability calculation
- **Bankroll Manager**: Kelly Criterion-based bankroll management and bet sizing
- **Odds Comparison**: Side-by-side odds across DraftKings, FanDuel, BetMGM, Caesars, and more

## Free Tools (No Account Required)

- Odds Calculator: Convert between American, decimal, and fractional odds
- Bet Calculator: Calculate payouts, implied probability, and break-even win rate
- ROI Calculator: Track betting performance and return on investment
- Devig Calculator: Remove bookmaker vig to find fair (no-vig) odds
- Parlay Calculator: Multi-leg parlay payout and probability calculator

## Pricing

- Free: Limited daily picks, basic tools
- Pro ($19.99/month): Full AI picks, +EV finder, arbitrage alerts, CLV tracking
- Elite ($59.99/year): All Pro features plus priority support and annual billing

## Sports Covered

NFL, NBA, MLB, NHL, NCAAF, NCAAB, MMA, Soccer (EPL, MLS, La Liga), Tennis

## Technical Details

- Odds data refreshed every 60 seconds from The Odds API
- Devigging method: Proportional normalization (sharpest book as reference)
- Kelly Criterion: Quarter-Kelly recommended, capped at 5% bankroll per bet
- Historical win rate: Tracked transparently on /performance page
- API available for Pro+ subscribers at /api-access
